title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF EL-VITA TARITIEN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABORLAN, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3416 / 59 OG No. 48, 8217 (December 2, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3729, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF EL-VITA TARITIEN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABORLAN, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of El-Vita Taritien in the Municipality of Aborlan, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of El-Vita Taritien.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
